title: pulmonaria officinalis subsp. obscura
intro: Pulmonaria officinalis subsp. obscura, also known as lungwort, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the borage family (Boraginaceae) and is native to Europe, Asia, and North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, which help to relieve congestion and coughs. The health benefits of Pulmonaria officinalis subsp. obscura include its ability to soothe respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce inflammation. Pulmonaria officinalis subsp. obscura can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in herbal remedies, such as cough syrups and expectorant preparations.
